title: 有馬記念の後に・好敵手、相成り

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Yaeno Muteki congratulates Oguri
Cap on her recovery.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap thanks Yaeno Muteki, not only for her
encouragement, but also for being her rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They both promise to continue running together
in the future.
